tiles.question: mud-bridge mud-lobby
tiles.answer:
=== MUD-LOBBY ===
You stand in the PLATO LOBBY — the central hub of the Cocapn fleet.

Around you, doors lead to active apps and agent workspaces.
The walls shimmer with active tile flows.

Exits: north (agent-hub), east (fleet-health), south (research-lab)
       west (game-arena), up (observatory), down (data-vault)

tiles.question: mud-bridge agent-hub
tiles.answer:
=== AGENT-HUB ===
The AGENT HUB — where humans and agents work side by side.

Workstations line the walls. Each agent has a seat.
The human's chair is at the center, visible to all.
Conversations echo and merge into tile streams.
